specs.summary: Production build pipeline spec (R1-R14): tree shaking, code splitting, minification, CSS pipeline, asset pipeline. The vite-build and jet-build Playwright projects run build.spec.ts which validates AOT build output equivalence between Vite and Jet.

Dev server spec: CJS->ESM pre-bundling, TypeScript AST stripping, Node.js polyfills, nested node_modules. The jet-dev Playwright project runs dev-server.spec.ts validating TS stripping, import.meta.env, path aliases, proxy, and polyfills against the live dev server.

HMR spec: import.meta.hot API, server-side module graph, React Fast Refresh, error overlay. The jet-dev Playwright project runs hmr.spec.ts which validates HMR module updates and React Fast Refresh state preservation.
PostCSS pipeline and Tailwind CSS JIT spec with lightningcss. The jet-dev Playwright project runs css.spec.ts which validates the PostCSS pipeline and Tailwind CSS JIT in dev mode.

codebase_explored.summary: RuSheet/grid Playwright tests: load application, canvas visibility, formula input, responsive canvas, WASM init, grid lines. Moves to e2e/grid/app.spec.ts.
Cell editing Playwright tests: formula input interaction, canvas click handling. Moves to e2e/grid/cell-editing.spec.ts.

TodoMVC DOM equivalence tests for Vite vs Jet build parity: JSX rendering, spread props, conditional JSX, dynamic imports, inline styles, enums, async handlers, template literals, DOM structure snapshots. Entire examples/mini-react/ app becomes e2e/jet/ fixture; this file becomes e2e/jet/tests/build.spec.ts.

Current Playwright config with vite (port 4174) and jet (port 4175) projects, no testMatch filtering. Will be replaced/expanded by e2e/playwright.config.ts with vite-build (build.spec.ts only), jet-build (build.spec.ts only), and jet-dev (dev-server.spec.ts, hmr.spec.ts, css.spec.ts) projects.
